recommendations.title: Finding Momo
recommendations.overview: One evening, when they come home, Mr. and Mrs. Prioux are astounded to find that a certain Patrick has moved into their place. This strange young man has returned home to his parents in order to introduce his wife.

recommendations.title: You'll Never Find Me
recommendations.overview: Patrick, a strange and lonely resident, lives in a mobile home at the back of an isolated caravan park. After a violent thunderstorm erupts, a mysterious young woman appears at his door, seeking shelter from the weather. The longer the night wears on

recommendations.title: Patrick
recommendations.overview: Patrick lays comatose in a small private hospital, his only action being his involuntary spitting. When a pretty young nurse, just separated from her husband, begins work at the hospital, she senses that Patrick is communicating with her, and he seem

recommendations.title: Auntie Mame
recommendations.overview: Mame Dennis, a progressive and independent woman of the 1920s, is left to care for her nephew Patrick after his wealthy father dies. Conflict ensues when the executor of the father's estate objects to the aunt's lifestyle and tries to force her to se

recommendations.title: My Policeman
recommendations.overview: In the late 1990s, the arrival of elderly invalid Patrick into Marion and Tom’s home triggers the exploration of seismic events from 40 years previous: the passionate relationship between Tom and Patrick at a time when homosexuality was illegal.

recommendations.title: The Hypnotist
recommendations.overview: After a young woman and her parents are murdered by a killer determined to wipe out the entire family, Detective Inspector Joona Linna works with a psychiatrist to hypnotize the son who narrowly escaped death in order to find the one surviving daught

recommendations.title: Komodo
recommendations.overview: During the 70's, some Komodo Dragon eggs were dumped on an North Carolina island. Somehow, the baby Komodos survived, and twenty years later they have grown up and taken over the island for themselves. Young Patrick has lost his parents and his dog t

recommendations.title: The Open House
recommendations.overview: A teenager and his mother find themselves besieged by threatening forces when they move into a new house.

recommendations.title: The Children
recommendations.overview: A relaxing Christmas vacation turns into a terrifying fight for survival as the children begin to turn on their parents.

recommendations.title: Daddy's Head
recommendations.overview: A boy and his stepmother fear for their safety after an eerie creature resembling the boy's recently deceased father visits them.
